display.purpose: Greetings, modal titles, and high-emphasis screen headings.

title.purpose: Buttons, row titles, and strong working UI labels.

body.purpose: Default readable UI text for forms, descriptions, and supporting copy.

label.purpose: Compact uppercase metadata and section tags.

shadows.name: chrome-lift
shadows.value: shadowColor: #000; shadowOffset: { width: 0, height: -1 }; shadowOpacity: 0.05; shadowRadius: 8; elevation: 8

shadows.name: toast-lift
shadows.value: shadowColor: #000; shadowOffset: { width: 0, height: 4 }; shadowOpacity: 0.1; shadowRadius: 8; elevation: 5

motion.name: tab-spring
motion.purpose: Focused tab icon and indicator response.

motion.name: card-press-spring
motion.purpose: Tactile press feedback on summary cards.

motion.name: page-enter
motion.purpose: List and section entrances on content-heavy screens.

narrative.overview: Splt is a warm, calm, trustworthy expense-sharing product UI. It uses restrained color, strong readability, and familiar native mobile structure to make money coordination feel lighter and clearer.
narrative.elevationPhilosophy: Flat by default, lifted only for chrome and overlay feedback.
narrative.componentPhilosophy: Tactile, compact, and familiar rather than ornamental.
dos: Keep semantic color tied to balances, status, and selection.
Use warm layered neutrals instead of cold white-gray app shells.
Favor native sheet, tab, list, and button patterns with light editorial polish.
donts: Do not drift back into flashy fintech with aggressive growth-product cues.
Do not turn the product into a gamified social app competing for attention.
Do not make the interface feel like cold accounting software that is dense, corporate, or spreadsheet-led.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Primary action pill for settling, confirming, and advancing.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #1A1A1A; color: #FFFFFF; border: none; border-radius: 9999px; padding: 9px 18px; font: 600 16px 'IBM Plex Sans'; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Secondary pill action for alternate flows like viewing balances.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { background: #FFFFFF; color: #1A1A1A; border: 1px solid #E7E5DE; border-radius: 9999px; padding: 9px 18px; font: 600 16px 'IBM Plex Sans'; }

components.name: Surface Card
components.description: Default summary surface used on dashboards, list modules, and grouped content.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #FEFDFA; color: #1A1A1A; border: 1px solid #E7E5DE; border-radius: 16px; padding: 14px 16px; }

components.name: Pill Search Field
components.description: Search and selector input treatment inside sheets and pickers.
components.css: .ds-search { background: #FFFFFF; color: #1A1A1A; border: 1px solid #E7E5DE; border-radius: 9999px; padding: 14px 16px; min-height: 52px; display: flex; align-items: center; }

components.name: Custom Tab Bar
components.description: Safe-area-aware bottom tab bar with icon-only destinations and a minimal active dot.
components.css: .ds-tabbar { background: #FFFFFF; border-top: 1px solid #E8E4DF; box-shadow: 0 -1px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.05); color: #8E8E93; } .ds-tabbar .active { color: #1A1A1A; }
